description: تحقيق 3: فحص USB المتصلة + كل فئات الأجهزة + محولات الشبكة + أجهزة BTHENUM
command_preview: Write-Output '=== ALL USB CONNECTED DEVICES ===' ; Get-PnpDevice -Class USB -Status OK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table FriendlyName, InstanceId -AutoSize ; Write-Output '=== ALL DEVICE CLASSES IN SYSTEM ===' ; Get-PnpDevice -Status OK | Group-Object Class | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Format-Table Count, Name -AutoSize ; Write-Output '=== NETWORK ADAPTERS (BT may appear here) ===' ; Get-NetAdapter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, InterfaceDescription, Status, MediaType -AutoSize ; Write-Output '=== DEVICE MANAGER - BLUETOOTH ENUM ===' ; Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.InstanceId -match 'BTHENUM|BTH' } | Format-Table Status, Class, FriendlyName, InstanceId -AutoSize
